text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross got injured during training, so I've
hurried her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I'm not doin' too great, but at least it's
nothin' the infirmary can't fix up for me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still, I don't think trainin's in the cards today... It
sucks, but I think I should stay put for now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But while I'm restin' up, everyone else is gonna be
out there makin' progress...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, some athletes tape up their injuries 'n
tough it out for races, even when it looks bad.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Compared to that, this is barely a scratch! A li'l
runnin' won't hurt, will it?
choice_data_list: I'm not letting you run a single meter.
...Okay. But you have to be careful.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, why're you bein' so stern all of a sudden? I
just wanted to test the waters.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I guess trainin' really is off the table today... All
right, I'll stay put and rest to speed up the healin'
process...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sounding frustrated, Tamamo Cross drifts back to
the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna test the waters a bit, yeah? I promise
I won't go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ow, ow, owww. Dammit, I think I just made my
injury worse.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Owwwww! Urk... I would've been better off stayin'
put till it was all better...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After pushing herself too hard, Tamamo Cross
worsens her injury. It ends up taking a while for
her to fully recover.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna test the waters a bit, yeah? I promise
I won't go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I think I can handle some light joggin'! The
school nurse sure knows her stuff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking care not to worsen her injury, Tamamo
Cross manages a light training session.
